creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Julien, hi Fernan,

there hasn't been an update on this issue [1] for quite a while. I'm
trying to find out what the state of this is. Is there an update for the
port that can be committed?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/128271
